ham.subject: Out of Office: [Your Name]
ham.body:
Hello,

Thank you for your email. I am currently out of the office with limited access to email. I will return on 15 May 2026 and respond to your message as soon as possible.

If you need immediate assistance, please contact my colleague Jane Doe at jane.doe@example.com.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

spam.subject: Urgent: Microsoft 365 Password Expiry Notice
spam.body:
Dear User,

Our records indicate that your Microsoft 365 account password will expire on 20 April 2026. To avoid any disruption to your services, please reset your password within the next 48 hours.

Click here to reset your password: <URL>

Failure to comply may result in temporary account lockout. This request is mandatory and has been approved by the IT Security Team.

Thank you for your immediate attention.

Regards,
Microsoft 365 Support
